_doc: Frozen semi-synthetic injected bank on REAL Lee2019 features (pre-reg v4). Real covariate/noise/subject structure + INJECTED known truth restores ground truth so false-confirmation AND power are measurable. DRY-RUN package only: definitions are frozen; NO bank is generated or run here. Each condition is regenerable from the seed schedule.

disjoint_from.realeeg_dev_probes: none (feasibility builder is deterministic, used no RNG seeds)

seed_schedule.disjointness_note: realeeg_base_seed 20000000 > 14100047 (B3 max) so all real-EEG seeds are disjoint from every synthetic and dev seed stream; the dry-run runner asserts this.

pooled_boundary_note: P_hat(Y|Z) 'pooled' means a logistic fit on BOTH sessions jointly, subject-grouped cross-fit (no leakage), used to draw Y* so that the null P(Y|Z) is condition-independent by construction.

conditions.name: NULL_real_session
conditions.input_sessions: within a single real session, split trials into two pseudo-conditions
conditions.split: stratified random (preserve L/R balance; random assignment, not contiguous)
conditions.held_fixed: P(Z) identical across pseudo-conditions (no covariate shift); P(Y|Z) identical
conditions.role: CALIBRATION check of the null machinery on real Z

conditions.name: NULL_cov
conditions.input_sessions: real session 1 vs session 2 (real cross-session covariate drift)
conditions.label_model: Y* ~ P_hat(Y|Z) from a SINGLE pooled boundary fit on both sessions (subject-grouped cross-fit)
conditions.injected_shift: the REAL cross-session covariate drift is present; NO concept shift
conditions.role: PRIMARY type-I null under real covariate drift (the deployment failure mode)

conditions.name: NULL_label
conditions.label_model: shift P(Y) across conditions with P(Z|Y) held fixed (class-conditional resampling of real trials)
conditions.held_fixed: P(Z|Y); only the class prior P(Y) differs across conditions
conditions.ground_truth: NO_CONCEPT (label-shift trap; must abstain / not confirm)

conditions.name: NULL_cov_plus_label
conditions.input_sessions: real session 1 vs 2 (real covariate) + prior shift
conditions.label_model: Y* ~ pooled P_hat(Y|Z), then class-conditional prior shift across conditions
conditions.held_fixed: P(Y|Z) boundary; covariate and prior both move

conditions.name: POS_concept
conditions.label_model: Y* ~ pooled P_hat(Y|Z) in condition -1/2; in condition +1/2 apply an ANTISYMMETRIC boundary rotation of pre-registered magnitude before drawing Y*
conditions.held_fixed: marginal P(Z) (real); only the decision boundary rotates with condition

conditions.name: POS_concept_plus_cov
conditions.input_sessions: real session 1 vs 2 (real covariate) + injected rotation
conditions.labels: SYNTHETIC (Y* with rotation on real covariate drift)
conditions.label_model: as POS_concept but on top of the real cross-session covariate drift

conditions.name: POS_pure_conditional
conditions.label_model: relabel so P(Y|Z) changes while the marginal P(Z) is held fixed (no marginal trace)
conditions.injected_shift: pure-conditional concept shift (Z-only unidentifiable by Prop.1)
conditions.role: SECONDARY reported (weak-by-theory; B3 target, A must abstain)

conditions.name: genuine_session_contrast_descriptive
conditions.input_sessions: real session 1 vs session 2, REAL labels
conditions.role: DESCRIPTIVE ONLY (report the verdict + subject-Delta distribution; NEVER gates PASS/FAIL; a CONCEPT_CONFIRMED here is not validated truth)
